title: Doctor Who Monsters
description: A mod that adds a few of the (non-human) enemies from the Sci-Fi show Doctor Who
body:
Doctor Who has Recurring Creatures

So this mod plans to add them all

so far all the mobs added are:

 - Daleks

 - Cybermen

 - Sontarans (WIP)

Plans to add:

 - The silence

 - The auton

 - silurians

 - the Ood

 - and many more
